name: Mocha Chip Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, chop together the chocolate cookies and melted butter.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie shell and freeze for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the ice cream, almonds, and chopped candy bar until well combined. Pour the mixture into the pie crust and freeze for 30 minutes.
4. Combine the chocolate chips and butter in a measuring cup. Microwave on high for 1 minute. If necessary, microwave for another 30 seconds to blend the chocolate mixture.
5. Drizzle the melted chocolate over the frozen pie and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of toasted almonds.
6. Chill the pie and serve cold.
Yield: One 9-inch pie
